notes:
Ember 1.9.5 — Fixed Ember Browser packaging bug, guard against invented email addresses

• Fixed the real cause of 'Ember Browser can't load its web engine — ModuleNotFoundError: PyQt6.QtWebChannel': that module was explicitly excluded from the packaged app to save space, without realizing QtWebEngine depends on it internally. It's bundled again now.
• Ember will no longer guess a placeholder email address (like name@example.com) when it doesn't know a contact's real one — sending to a reserved/placeholder domain is now refused outright, and Ember is instructed to ask for the real address instead of assuming one.

Builds on 1.9.4's real screen lock fix, Mic On button, and ad-blocker caveat.
